Thirteen fantastic racers are facing off in this huge 
year-end race, the Arima Kinen.

But all eyes are on the fifth-ever Triple Crown champion, 
Narita Brian.

The course is full of the strongest contenders, who've all 
got their sights set on her.

It's not every day I get to race against a Triple Crown 
champion. I'm gonna enjoy this!
Forging a path way out ahead is Twin Turbo! What speed!
Turbo booooost!
The runners have entered the backstretch.
Narita Brian is maintaining her place as second in the pack.

Hey now… Won't that kinda pace tire her out before the 
last spurt?
Hmm, guess I can't count on that. The Narita Brian will have energy left to spare!

Heheh! Crazy, but nobody beats me on the last stretch! 
Let's do this!
They're rounding the third corner.

The runaway Twin Turbo is outpacing the rest of the pack 
by ten lengths! Is this part of her strategy, or is she out of 
control?!
What's this?! Narita Brian is picking up the pace!

Rice Shower is hot on their tails! And coming in from the 
outside is Hishi Amazon!

Narita Brian makes a sudden break ahead! Following right 
behind is the mighty Hishi Amazon! Twin Turbo's lead is at 
an end!
Narita Brian takes the lead! Brian has the lead!
Haaaaah!

The rest of the pack is chasing behind, but they can't close 
the gap! Narita Brian has broken away!
Uraaaaagh! Narita Brian! It's you and me, one-on-ooone!
Hishi Amazon is hanging on to the very last second!
But it's Brian! Narita Brian has just won her fifth crown!

A true match between powerhouses! Next year, she could 
even surpass Rudolph! What a colossal victory!
